text:
Max 
Carson  
Room 101 
 
What my father means to me is that he is very important to me. He is really nice to me and 
cares about me.  He is really hard working too.  My dad is really hard working.  He barely ever 
misses work. He always works and tries his best. My dad spends quality time with me and when 
l go with him on the weekends we go out to eat, hang out, play soccer and have fun. That  is 
why my father is special to me  l am lucky to have him.
lines: What my father means to me is that he is very important to me. He is really nice to me and
cares about me.  He is really hard working too.  My dad is really hard working.  He barely ever

l go with him on the weekends we go out to eat, hang out, play soccer and have fun. That  is
why my father is special to me  l am lucky to have him.
